basic_details.job_title: Central University of Jharkhand Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Jharkhand has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 28 Assistant Professor (Temporary) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the Central University of Jharkhand office with original documents and self-attested copies.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. degree. Specific qualifications vary by department.
qualification.details: Business Administration: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A./ICWA/ M.Com with First Class or equivalent and two years of professional experience after acquiring the degree of Master's degree. Commerce and Financial Studies: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Computer Science and Engineering: B.E. / B. Tech. / B.S. and M.E. / M. Tech. / M.S. or Integrated M. Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. OR Ph.D. in Computer Science & Engineering along with MCA. Economics and Development Studies: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Education: Postgraduate degree in Social Sciences with minimum 55% marks, and M.Ed. degree from a recognised university with minimum 55% marks. OR Postgraduate (MA) degree in Education with minimum 55% marks, and B.Ed./B.El.Ed. degree with minimum 55% marks. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Electrical and Energy Engineering: B.E. / B. Tech. / B.S. and M.E. / M. Tech. / M.S. or Integrated M. Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. Environmental Sciences: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Far East Languages (Chinese): Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in Chinese Language or a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Geography: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Geology: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Hindi: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Mathematics: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Metallurgical & Materials Engineering: B.E. / B. Tech. / B.S. and M.E. / M. Tech. / M.S. or Integrated M. Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent in any one of the degrees. Performing Arts: Master's Degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in the relevant subject or an equivalent degree from an Indian/foreign University. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC, CSIR or similar test accredited by the UGC like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the University Grants Commission (Minimum Standards and Procedure for Award of M.Phil./Ph.D. Degree) Regulations, 2009 or 2016. OR A traditional or a professional artist with highly commendable professional achievement in the subject concerned having a Bachelor's degree. Physics: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Political Science and Public Administration: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in Political Science / Public Administration a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016. Statistics and Data Science: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade) in Statistics/Data Science/Computer Science a concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or the CSIR, or a similar test accredited by the UGC, like SLET/SET or who are or have been awarded a Ph. D. Degree in the concerned subject in accordance with the UGC Regulations, 2009 or 2016.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
Central University of Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Central University of Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Central University of Jharkhand Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Jharkhand Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, with multiple dates scheduled from June 30, 2026, to July 10, 2026. Candidates should attend the interview on any of these dates as per their convenience and department requirements.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: Generally, a Master's degree with 55% marks and NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. is required. However, specific qualifications vary by department, with some engineering roles requiring B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 57,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies for the Assistant Professor (Temporary) positions across various departments.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central University of Jharkhand office, Ranchi, Jharkhand, 835222.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, a photocopy of self-attested documents, and two colour photographs. A filled-in downloaded application form is also required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The job type is Temporary.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of the Central University of Jharkhand?
faq.answer: The official website of the Central University of Jharkhand is http://www.cuj.ac.in.
